spec.name: A Sloping Tunnel
spec.description: The tunnel continues its slope upwards, and the wind blows at you even stronger yet. The claw tracks in the stone stop abruptly here, where there seems to be a lot of unearthed dirt and stone around, heaped upon the floor. You feel uneasy about this place.

extra_descs.description: It has been dug from somewhere, but where?
They stop very abruptly here, right where the piles of earth begin, it seems.
The floor up ahead looks... strange. You don't think going ahead would be a good idea.
